creator: vwe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Tomasz, 
can you give us the output of `ifconfig re0`, output of `vmstat -ia` and 
`devinfo -rv`, `sysctl net`, please? 
Also, are you using a firewall on your (server-)machine? Do you seen similar 
problems with or without the firewall being active?
